def positive_f_string_evaluated_eagerly_inside_logging_call():
    rule_id = "f_string_evaluated_eagerly_inside_logging_call"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "f-string passed directly to logger.debug/info/warning, eagerly evaluating even when the level is disabled."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
